Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Brenda Hutcherson
Attorney, Paul Arshawsky, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Veronica Davis, Glen Davis, Nathan Davis and Glen Davis JR. are present.
Attorney, Ming Chung , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of MAY-02-2011 remains on calendar.
